name: codex
description: Delegate a coding task to the local OpenAI Codex CLI — write, refactor, explain code or run a repo task. Uses your Codex/ChatGPT subscription (not the API key). Requires the Codex CLI installed and signed in.

task.description: The full coding task, e.g. 'add type hints to utils.py'

run.template: command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Codex CLI not found — install it and run: codex login'; exit 0; }; codex exec {{task}}
